useCases.title: Morning Deep Work Session
useCases.summary: Engineer activates focus mode for a 2-hour deep work session
useCases.description: Engineer activates focus mode for a 2-hour deep work session

scenario.context: Engineer has a complex feature to implement requiring uninterrupted concentration
scenario.before: Engineer puts on headphones, mutes Slack, and hopes no one taps their shoulder
scenario.after: Engineer clicks 'Start Focus', notifications are batched, team sees DND status, 2 hours of uninterrupted work
scenario.impact: 2x more code output during focus sessions, measurable via commit analytics

useCases.trigger: Engineer selects a task and clicks the 'Start Focus' button
preconditions: Engineer has at least one task assigned
Focus Mode feature is enabled for the workspace
postconditions: Focus session data recorded for analytics

mainFlow.action: Engineer selects the task to focus on from the priority queue
System activates focus mode, batches notifications, and syncs DND status
Engineer works uninterrupted for the configured focus period
System suggests a break after 25 minutes (Pomodoro)

alternativeFlows.name: P0 Breakthrough
steps: A P0 blocker is reported that affects the engineer's current work
System breaks through focus mode with a distinct alert sound and visual
Engineer acknowledges the alert and decides whether to exit focus mode

exceptionFlows.name: Slack DND Sync Failure
exceptionFlows.trigger: Slack API returns an error when trying to set DND status
exceptionFlows.handling: System logs the error, continues focus mode locally, and retries Slack sync in 30 seconds

businessRules: Only P0 notifications can break through focus mode by default
Focus sessions are tracked for minimum 5 minutes to count in analytics
useCases.notes: User research shows engineers lose 23 minutes of productive time per interruption.
